license_strategy: Original localization and terminology synthesis supported by selected official public sources for measurement, drug-label and terminology governance. Local resources must be verified at runtime.

ORIGINAL-MULTI-001.title: Original multilingual and regionalization framework for medical RAG
ORIGINAL-MULTI-001.license_notes: Original authored synthesis; requires clinical, legal, localization and product review.
ORIGINAL-MULTI-001.used_for: Translation safety, regional terminology, units, medication names, emergency wording and privacy governance.

NIST-SI-001.title: NIST SI units and measurement reference
NIST-SI-001.organization: National Institute of Standards and Technology
NIST-SI-001.license_notes: Official public reference; final legal review required.
NIST-SI-001.used_for: Units, measurement normalization and conversion governance.

FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.title: FDA OTC Drug Facts label framework
FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.license_notes: Official public reference; final legal review required.
FDA-DRUGFACTS-001.used_for: Drug Facts, active ingredient and label-driven medication-name normalization.

WHO-ICD-001.title: WHO International Classification of Diseases overview
WHO-ICD-001.license_notes: Official public reference; final legal review required.
WHO-ICD-001.used_for: Controlled terminology and non-diagnostic coding boundary context.

HL7-FHIR-001.title: HL7 FHIR terminology and localization concepts
HL7-FHIR-001.license_notes: Standards reference; licensing and implementation terms require review.
HL7-FHIR-001.used_for: Interoperability, coding, language tags and data-model governance.

excluded_sources.title: Unverified emergency/crisis/toxicology numbers copied from forums or old pages
excluded_sources.reason: Must be verified at runtime; high risk if stale.

excluded_sources.title: Country-specific legal reporting instructions without jurisdiction review
Commercial medication brand databases copied wholesale
excluded_sources.reason: Licensing and staleness risk; use active-ingredient mapping and runtime label verification.

excluded_sources.title: Machine-translated clinical rules without clinical review
